item.title: Re: Junior Staff Post - Wikiwalk
item.content:encoded: My only suggestion would be to shift that to the second sentence of the description, right after "Affected subjects," only out of personal preference for keeping references outside of the opening line of the description. Other than that these are solid crosslinks.

item.title: Junior Staff Post - Wikiwalk
item.content:encoded:
Timer Expired. Edits made as discussed below. Author may revert at any time.

The WikiWalk Team is proposing edits to this page. All proposed edits will be in a collapsible below this post, and after 7 days if there are no serious objections to the edits, the feedback received will be taken into account as the edits are made. If you have questions not directly related to the article about this project, please pm a member of the WikiWalk Team.

+ show block
– hide block

Reading this, I was immediately reminded of two SCPs - SCP-1659 and SCP-2390. A simple crosslink could be added to reference both of these SCPs.

Changing this:

Description: SCP-3510 is an unknown anomaly that can affect subjects in positions of major governmental or economic control. Affected subjects (hereafter referred at as SCP-3510-A instances) will believe that they are a member of "New Providence," (SCP-3510-B) a global organization claimed to exert control over all national governments and large corporations.

To this:

Description: Description: SCP-3510 is an unknown anomaly that can affect subjects in positions of major governmental or economic control. Affected subjects1 (hereafter referred at as SCP-3510-A instances) will believe that they are a member of "New Providence," (SCP-3510-B) a global organization claimed to exert control over all national governments and large corporations.

If anyone has any other ideas, feel free to suggest them below.

Footnotes
1. No subjects have been known to be affected by both SCP-3510 and either SCP-1659 or SCP-2390.

item.title: Re: Trigger warning : Reference to antisemitism
item.content:encoded:
Wait a second… is this the Jewish conspiracy? Does that mean InfoWars is a Foundation front? Requesting Word of God on the matter.

It has nothing to do with that. It's simply a take on generic New World Order type conspiracy theories.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
after drinking a cup of water containing high quantities of hydrochloric acid.

Upvoted for making me laugh.

item.title: Trigger warning : Reference to antisemitism
item.content:encoded:
Wait a second… is this the Jewish conspiracy? Does that mean InfoWars is a Foundation front? Requesting Word of God on the matter.

Addendum: I am not arguing that the Jewish conspiracy is real. In fact, I believe that there are entries on this site that have more of a basis in objective reality than the Jewish conspiracy.

I just love fiction that re-contextualizes the real world and it's history. In fact, the only parts of Harry Potter I found paletteable (sc?) were the bits where they went back to important parts of London history and gave the story about what was *actually* happening. You know, Jack the Ripper was actually a Death Eater rampage intended to wipe out the mudbloods, the London Fires were actually a duel between professional rivals that got hilariously out of hand and resulted in the current government's rules for dueling, etc.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Based on how SCP-3510-A instances said variations on them "filling a gap in the world that had to be filled" when interrogated for motivations, researchers slowly developed the current containment procedures for SCP-3510.

This sentence was clunky to read. I had to go over it a few times to catch the meaning. Maybe flip the sentence around, like "Current containment procedures have been developed after an instance was found, in an interview, to reveal that the replacing of persons of interest is the process of 'filling a gap in the world that had to be filled'."or something of the like.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
4. The cadavers found in the Hudson River have not been identified.

So…you're saying I do not recognize the bodies in the water?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Yeah, alright.

The Foundation basically becoming SCP-3510-B as a means of containing SCP-3510 has a certain irony to it that I personally enjoy enough to upvote.

+1, 9volt

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This misses the mark for me, personally. It feels too silly to be taken seriously, yet too serious to be properly silly. +-0

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I was thinking about placing it after the mention of the cadavers, though I was worried about it taking away from the twist about the MTF still being alive. Once the contest is over I may switch it around though.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: That was really interesting! Footnote four seems out of place, though. Like, placed incorrectly.

item.title: Confirmed
item.content:encoded:
Second time entering a contest woot!

Thanks to MaliceAforethought, Captain Kirby, TheGreatSea, BananaRepublic, Modern_Erasmus for reading and critting this draft! Special thanks to Tanhony and Decibelles for coming up with the task force names.

Note to self: about the lampshading you mentioned, would adding a sentence to the description about how the mimicking is basically creating the anomaly in a more controlled state help?
